# doit_datahub_dataset (Resource)

Manages a DataHub dataset.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a DataHub dataset
resource "doit_datahub_dataset" "example" {
  name        = "My Custom Dataset"
  description = "Dataset for tracking custom business metrics"
}

output "dataset_name" {
  value = doit_datahub_dataset.example.name
}

output "dataset_records" {
  value = doit_datahub_dataset.example.records
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the dataset. Allowed characters: alphanumeric (0-9,a-z,A-Z), underscore (_), dash (-), and spaces between words.

### Optional

- `description` (String) An optional description for the dataset.

### Read-Only

- `last_updated` (String) The timestamp of the last update.
- `records` (Number) The number of records in the dataset.
- `updated_by` (String) The email of the user who last updated the dataset.
